jgnActs.jgnFactShow: InclusionProofSucceeds( $P, $L, <$CA, $id, pk(~sk), 'pubKey', ~sn, $i, $j>, <<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', ~sn.1, $i0, $j0>, sign(<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', ~sn.1, $i0, $j0>, ~skCA.1) >, < <<$CA, $id, pk(~sk), 'pre-cert', ~sn, $i, $j>, sign(<$CA, $id, pk(~sk), 'pre-cert', ~sn, $i, $j>, ~skCA)>, <$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', ~sn.1, $i0, $j0>, sign(<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', ~sn.1, $i0, $j0>, ~skCA.1) >, ~sth, ~session)
Asserts( $P, 'This loggers log currently includes these fields.', $L, <<$CA, $id, pk(~sk), 'pubKey', ~sn, $i, $j>, ~session>)

jgnFactTerms.jgnConst: 'This loggers log currently includes these fields.'

jgnPrems.jgnFactShow: In( < <<$CA, $id, pk(~sk), 'pre-cert', ~sn, $i, $j>, sign(<$CA, $id, pk(~sk), 'pre-cert', ~sn, $i, $j>, ~skCA)>, <$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', ~sn.1, $i0, $j0>, sign(<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', ~sn.1, $i0, $j0>, ~skCA.1) >)

jgnActs.jgnFactShow: LoggerComputesAddLog( $L, $log_id, <$CA, $id, pk(~sk), 'pubKey', ~sn, $i, $j>, <<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', ~sn.1, $i0, $j0>, sign(<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', ~sn.1, $i0, $j0>, ~skCA.1) >, < <<$CA, $id, pk(~sk), 'pre-cert', ~sn, $i, $j>, sign(<$CA, $id, pk(~sk), 'pre-cert', ~sn, $i, $j>, ~skCA)>, <$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', ~sn.1, $i0, $j0>, sign(<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', ~sn.1, $i0, $j0>, ~skCA.1) >, $now.4)

K( < <<$CA, $id, pk(~sk), 'pre-cert', ~sn, $i, $j>, sign(<$CA, $id, pk(~sk), 'pre-cert', ~sn, $i, $j>, ~skCA)>, <$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', ~sn.1, $i0, $j0>, sign(<$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', ~sn.1, $i0, $j0>, ~skCA.1) >)
